ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., CNN, LSTM) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "model_tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "file_size_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Avro) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Number of the training run (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the training run (JSON format) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training run ended */,
  "run_start_time_utc" TEXT /* Start time of the run in UTC */,
  "run_end_time_utc" TEXT /* End time of the run in UTC */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "run_status_details" TEXT /* Detailed status information about the run (e.g., error messages) */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who trained the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_runs_trained_by FOREIGN KEY ("trained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training run */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., loss, accuracy, ROC AUC score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the metric (e.g., standard deviation) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken for the epoch (HH:MM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model version */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the model version in MB */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the model version (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the model or dataset (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment_edit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last edit to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment_edit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last edit to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
